---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-mcp-milestone-0
key: sv0-mcp-milestone-0
state: draft
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-mcp
  - mcp
  - neo4j
title: "milestone 0: sv0-mcp server, sync, and documentation alignment"
type: task
---

# milestone 0: sv0-mcp (graph memory + MCP)

## purpose

**sv0-mcp** is the submodule that implements the MCP server, Neo4j sync, watchers, and CLI used to **develop and debug** the sv0 toolchain. it does not replace **sv0doc** (normative language spec); it **indexes** spec entities, compiler structure, VM components, and `task/` workflow state for AI agents and humans.

this milestone is complete when:

- the server and sync workflow are documented in **sv0-mcp** (`README.md`, setup, Cursor config)
- **sv0doc** describes where toolchain and MCP documentation live (hub role; see `sv0doc/README.md`)
- unit tests pass via `uv run pytest` from **sv0-mcp** (or `./scripts/sv0 test-mcp` from the parent repo)
- parent **sv0-toolchain** references this milestone from `task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`

## dependencies

/require: bash
/require: python3

## configuration

/env: SV0_MCP_ROOT=sv0-mcp
/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.

## phase 1: verify Python package and tests

/run: 01-verify-package.sh

## phase 2: documentation cross-links

/ai: ensure sv0doc README "relationship to other subprojects" mentions sv0-mcp and points to sv0-mcp README for MCP setup, graph schema, and Cursor integration.

## milestone completion check

/assert: test -f $SV0_MCP_ROOT/README.md
/assert: test -f $SV0_MCP_ROOT/pyproject.toml
/assert: test -d $SV0_MCP_ROOT/src/sv0_mcp

## refinement log

- 2026-05-11: Documented **operational discipline**: when **`task/`** milestones, **sv0doc** normative files, or indexed compiler layout change materially, run **`cd sv0-mcp && ./scripts/sync-graph.sh all`** (or **`uv run sv0-mcp sync --scope all`**, or MCP **`sync_graph`** scope **`all`**) so **Neo4j** and MCP tools reflect current tasks and spec links. Parent **README** and **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`** now point contributors at this step.
- 2026-05-12: **`sv0-mcp/README.md`** — subsection **“When to run a full sync”** (what to refresh after, shell commands, MCP **`sync_graph`**, link back to parent README) so submodule-only readers do not need the meta-repo to learn the workflow.
- 2026-05-13: Parent **`scripts/sv0 test`** usage + **`make test`** help describe **stage0** golden + Python guards; graph sync after **`task/`** edits.
- 2026-05-14: **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`** documents **`make help`**; graph sync after **`task/`** edits.
- 2026-05-15: Graph sync after milestone **2/3** + roadmap README edits (**M3** scope clarity).
- 2026-05-16: Graph sync after YAML front-matter normalization on roadmap / M2 prep / M3 self-host / **sv0vm** M2 task files.
- 2026-04-02: Parent **`verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** in **`sv0 test`** keeps **`task/*.Rmd`** parseable for sync extractors; graph sync after this batch of **`task/`** edits.
- 2026-04-03: Workspace **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`** documents **YAML spacing** for **`task/*.Rmd`**; graph sync after task YAML normalization.
- 2026-04-04: Parent **`.cursor/rules/`** numbered **`.mdc`** agent modules + **README** cross-link under agent workflow; graph sync after **`task/`** touch.
- 2026-04-05: **`sv0 test-guards`** / **`make test-guards`** documented in **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`** and workspace; graph sync after **`task/`** touch.
- 2026-04-06: Roadmap snapshot + **Cursor** **`15-root-orchestration-entrypoints`** rule reference **`test-guards`**; graph sync after **`task/`** + **`.cursor/rules/`** touch.
- 2026-05-20: Parent **`verify_readme_sv0c_gitlink.py`** in **`sv0 test`** / **`test-guards`**; task doc updates (M2 prep, workspace, roadmap); graph sync after **`task/`** touch.
- 2026-05-21: **VM parity v1** in **sv0c** + parent harness; **`vm-parity-v1`** tag on **sv0c**; graph sync after **`task/`** touch.
- 2026-04-10: New **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-checklist.Rmd`** (**`/include:`** from M3 self-host); **`examples/learn/12`**–**`13`**; run **`./scripts/sync-graph.sh all`** (or MCP **`sync_graph`** scope **`all`**) when **Neo4j** is up so the new task node and roadmap edges are visible.
- 2026-04-10: **`sv0-mcp/README.md`** + **`docker-compose.yml`** — document **custom Bolt host ports** via **`SV0_MCP_NEO4J_URI`** / Cursor **`NEO4J_URI`** alignment; **connection refused** troubleshooting; parent **README** cross-link.
- 2026-04-11: **`examples/learn/14`–`16`** + roadmap/M3 log; run **`./scripts/sync-graph.sh all`** when **Neo4j** is available so task/roadmap edits are reflected in the graph.
- 2026-04-12: VM **`no_alias`**, **`transliteration-plan.md`**, learn **`17`**; graph sync when DB is up.
